patches.reason: External codex-hxrust scaffold check profiles generated haxe_call_stack_call_stack_impl_.rs with an unresolved root Exception type when CallStack.exceptionToString used Exception directly.
patches.change: Use Dynamic and deterministic placeholder output for target-local exceptionToString until haxe.rust owns a fuller stack/exception integration fix.
patches.followUp: Upstream or replace this patch in haxe.rust before treating the pin as clean.
